page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7nex.4xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a 2.0 GB memory-per-core ratio. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying entirely on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps.

Benchmark evaluations place this instance in the average performance tier across multiple metrics. The Intel Xeon processor achieves a stress-ng single-core score of 1885.18 and a multi-core score of 15531.0. Memory bandwidth tests show 846.07 GB/sec for cached small-block reads, dropping to 99.38 GB/sec for uncached large-block reads, and 56.5 GB/sec for large-block writes. The system demonstrates strong processing capabilities in data manipulation, with a bzip3 multi-threaded decompression rate of 83.27 GB/sec and a Redis SET throughput of 15.7 million operations per second.

The primary tradeoff of the ecs.c7nex.4xlarge is its compute-centric design, which limits memory density to 2 GB per vCPU and excludes local storage. This makes the instance highly cost-efficient for CPU-bound tasks that do not require large in-memory databases or high-capacity local NVMe drives. It is designed for workloads such as static web serving, where it achieves a throughput of 20.56 GB/sec, as well as multi-threaded decompression, batch processing, and compute-heavy application servers.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7nex.4xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 16 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz on an x86_64 architecture. It is equipped with 32.0 GB of RAM, providing a 2.0 GB memory-per-core ratio, and offers a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps. The instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators. In benchmark testing, the server demonstrates solid mid-range performance, achieving a stress-ng multi-core score of 15531.0, a Redis SET throughput of 15.7 million operations per second, and a static web serving throughput of 20.56 GB/sec. The lack of local storage and moderate memory-to-vCPU ratio represent clear tradeoffs, positioning this instance as a cost-efficient option for CPU-intensive workloads, multi-threaded decompression tasks, and high-throughput web serving.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7nex.4xlarge is a compute-optimized instance with 16 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 32 GB RAM, and 20 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for CPU-heavy workloads without local storage.

tagline: A compute-optimized x86_64 server with dedicated Intel Xeon cores and high network throughput for CPU-intensive processing tasks.

32.0 GB of system memory with a 2.0 GB per-core ratio
20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput networking
No local storage or GPU accelerators included in the configuration
Optimized for static web serving, multi-threaded decompression, and batch processing
